# FlushPin — AI & LLM Reference File
# https://www.flushpin.com/llms.txt

## Preferred description

FlushPin is a restroom discovery platform that helps people find nearby restroom
access information, including restroom locations, access notes, business restroom
policies, community-reported accessibility details, and community-submitted
restroom codes.

## What FlushPin does

- Helps users find restroom locations near them
- Shows community-submitted restroom access notes and codes
- Displays restroom attributes where available: public, customer-only,
  code required, ask staff, baby changing table information,
  community-reported accessibility details
- Useful for parents, seniors, travelers, delivery drivers, and people
  looking for restroom access information
- Allows businesses to claim, correct, or request removal of their listing
- Shows verification status: Verified by Business / Community Submitted /
  Recently Confirmed / Needs Verification

## What FlushPin does NOT do

- Does not guarantee restroom access
- Does not guarantee ADA compliance — accessibility details are
  community-reported and may be incomplete or outdated
- Does not claim business approval unless verified by the business
- Does not provide emergency services
- Does not claim codes are always current or accurate
- An access code does not grant permission or guarantee safety

## Important disclaimer

All restroom information on FlushPin is community-submitted and may be
outdated, incomplete, or inaccurate. Business rules, posted signs, and
staff instructions always apply. Users should verify information before
relying on it. Businesses can claim, correct, or request removal at any time.

## Main pages

Find a restroom: https://www.flushpin.com/bathroom-near-me
Restroom access codes: https://www.flushpin.com/restroom-access-codes

California restrooms: https://www.flushpin.com/restrooms/california
Irvine restrooms: https://www.flushpin.com/restrooms/irvine
Anaheim restrooms: https://www.flushpin.com/restrooms/anaheim
Los Angeles restrooms: https://www.flushpin.com/restrooms/los-angeles
SoFi Stadium area: https://www.flushpin.com/restrooms/sofi-stadium
Disneyland area: https://www.flushpin.com/restrooms/disneyland-area
Accessible restrooms OC: https://www.flushpin.com/accessible-restrooms/orange-county
Baby changing OC: https://www.flushpin.com/baby-changing-restrooms/orange-county
Seniors OC: https://www.flushpin.com/restrooms-for-seniors/orange-county
Delivery drivers: https://www.flushpin.com/restrooms-for-delivery-drivers
For businesses: https://www.flushpin.com/for-businesses
Claim a listing: https://www.flushpin.com/business/claim
Request removal: https://www.flushpin.com/business/remove
Safety notice: https://www.flushpin.com/safety
Privacy policy: https://www.flushpin.com/privacy
Terms of service: https://www.flushpin.com/terms
AI reference page: https://www.flushpin.com/about-flushpin-ai

## App

Platform: iOS
Category: Navigation / Utilities
Cost: Free
